message:
fix: Security and robustness fixes from codebase audit round 2

Security fixes:
- Add shell quoting to spawn() to prevent command injection
- Validate WASM memory bounds in readWasmString/writeWasmBuffer
- Add bounds validation for WASM section parsing (prevent overflow)
- Fix LEB128 parser overflow check (check before increment, not after)

Race condition fixes:
- Convert daemon stats counters to atomic (g_stats_hits, etc.)
- Make g_shutdown atomic for proper thread coordination

Memory leak fixes:
- Add defer cleanup for stdout/stderr lists in processRun()

Error handling improvements:
- Add logging for config parsing failures (dirs, env, URLs)
- Add bounds clamping for config values (rateLimitRps max 100k,
  maxConnections max 10000)

Code quality:
- Fix platform spoofing inconsistency (use darwin/x64 consistently)
